name: whatsapp_verify_webhook
description: Verify webhook endpoint for WhatsApp Business API. This is required for Meta to validate your webhook URL and enable message receiving.

hub.challenge.description: Challenge string from Meta to echo back

hub.verify_token.description: Verification token that matches your configured token

implementation_notes: This function should be implemented in your webhook endpoint
Return the hub.challenge value if verification succeeds
Verify that hub.verify_token matches your configured token
This is called by Meta during webhook setup
